mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SBMSN_DOC( SBMSN_DOC_NO , SBMSN_DOC_TY_CD , REG_DT , ATCH_FILE_ID) VALUES ( #{sbmsnDocNo} , #{sbmsnDocTyCd} , SYSDATE , #{atchFileId})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO , AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM , AC.DOROJUSO
FROM RENT_LISTING RL
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RL.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE RL.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD = 'GENERAL'
AND UPPER(AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO)
FROM RENT_LISTING RL
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RL.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE RL.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD = 'GENERAL'
AND UPPER(AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT DISTINCT AU.DONG_NO , AU.DONG_NM
FROM RENT_LISTING RL INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RL.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO WHERE RL.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD = 'GENERAL' AND RL.DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL' AND AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY AU.DONG_NO

SELECT DISTINCT AD.HO_NO , AD.HO
FROM RENT_LISTING RL
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RL.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
WHERE RL.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD = 'GENERAL' AND AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND AU.DONG_NO = #{dongNo} AND RL.DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL' ORDER BY AD.HO_NO

SELECT RL.RENT_LSTG_NO , RL.RENT_TYPE_CD , RL.DPST_AMT , RL.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , RL.RENT_TTL , RL.RENT_LSTG_CN , RL.MVIN_PSBL_DT
FROM RENT_LISTING RL
WHERE RL.HO_NO = #{hoNo} AND RL.DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL'
